use_cases: Landing page hero sections for SaaS and tech products
Premium product showcases with animated entrance effects
Portfolio or creative agency landing pages
ai_summary: A premium animated hero section featuring a fixed transparent navbar with logo and motion-enhanced entrance animations. Uses framer-motion for smooth scale, opacity, and blur transitions on mount. Includes responsive mobile menu toggle with blur backdrop effects, representing a modern glass-morphism aesthetic suitable for high-end product presentations.
